notes: Production runtime intentionally remains CC7.5.25 legacy layered loader.
AdminKit Core is still side-by-side and not active globally in production webhook routing.
Core channels.home uses read-only data adapter and displays real channel title/post counts.
Core buttons.home reads ak_post_buttons and legacy/raw payloads; if both are empty it now discovers candidate button storage tables/columns through information_schema.
Discovery is SELECT-only: table/column names and row counts only, no writes and no client data mutation.
Screen now shows source split core=<n>, legacy=<n> and a diagnostic block with candidate tables/columns.
The Add/Manage buttons actions in Core remain informational only; legacy button flow is untouched.
Next migration step: redeploy, verify buttonStorageDiscoveryReady=true, open Core Кнопки and inspect the diagnostic candidate tables.
